organization_name: Horizons National Student Enrichment Program Inc
city: Boston, MA; West Haven, CT; Fairfield, CT; Pomfret, CT; New Canaan, CT; Greens Farms, CT; New Haven, CT; Simsbury, CT; Norwalk, CT; Greenwich, CT; New York, NY; Buffalo, NY; Rochester, NY; Newark, NJ; Rumson, NJ; Lincroft, NJ; Philadelphia, PA; Lancaster, PA; Wilmington, DE; Centreville, MD; Chestertown, MD; Salisbury, MD; Washington, D.C.; Virginia Beach, VA; Norfolk, VA; San Diego, CA; San Francisco, CA; Salt Lake City, UT; Denver, CO; Albuquerque, NM; St. Louis, MO; Chicago, IL; Charleston, SC; Savannah, GA; Atlanta, GA; Fort Pierce, FL; Nashville, TN; Indianapolis, IN; Asheville, NC; Greenville, NC;
mission_statement: Horizons is a tuition-free, multi-year academic and enrichment program for students from under-resourced communities who lack access to expanded learning opportunities. In 2025, Horizons programs served over 7,500 students at 71 sites across 21 states.
